# Kazu Toribio

> Kazu Toribio is an AI Automation Innovation Specialist and Technical Virtual Assistant based in Naic, Cavite, Philippines, with 5+ years of experience building automated workflows, CRM systems, and marketing automation for businesses.

## Services

- AI Automation (n8n, Make, Zapier, OpenAI)
- Sales & Marketing assistance
- CRM Management (Zoho, GoHighLevel, Brivity, KW Command)
- Web & Landing Pages (WordPress)
- Content & Design (Canva, Adobe)
- Process & SOPs

## Selected projects

- Support Triage (n8n + Groq AI + Airtable + Slack)
- AI Lead Routing Workflow (n8n + GoHighLevel + Groq AI): https://github.com/toribiokazu/ai-lead-routing-ghl
- Xero → Asana Transaction Export (Make.com): https://github.com/toribiokazu/xero-asana-transaction-export-automation
- Email Nurture System (Mailchimp + Airtable): https://github.com/toribiokazu/email-nurture-system
- WordPress Product Site (WordPress + SEO + GoHighLevel)
- CRM Migration & Cleanup (Zoho → GoHighLevel, 10,000+ contacts)
- AI Content Pipeline (ChatGPT + n8n + Airtable + Slack + WordPress): https://github.com/toribiokazu/ai-content-pipeline
- AdPilot (React + TypeScript, cross-platform ad campaign builder/optimizer): https://github.com/toribiokazu/adpilot

## Skills

n8n, Make, Zapier, Airtable, GoHighLevel, ChatGPT, OpenAI, Zoho CRM, Brivity, KW Command, WordPress, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, After Effects, Google Analytics, DocuSign, Calendly, RingCentral.
